description: Create a new email template in Odoo CRM named 'Opportunity Follow-Up' for the Lead/Opportunity (crm.lead) model. The template subject must be 'Following up: {{ object.name }}'. The email body must include a greeting using the partner's name ({{ object.partner_id.name }}), a reference to the opportunity name ({{ object.name }}), the phrase 'Thank you for your interest', and the closing 'Best regards'. Save the template once configured.
